channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Clash of Clans ‘Foot Tribute Bundle’ Goes Live For Cultured Gamers
item.content:encoded:
Clash of Clans has announced the arrival of the Foot Tribute Bundle, a bizarre decoration pack that users can purchase in-game starting yesterday, April 16. In a post on social media, the team revealed the bundle is ‘bare and unapologetically regal’, but it’s not until you scope out the Foot Tribute Bundle that you realize it’s not as creepy as it first sounds.

If you want to scoop the Foot Tribute Bundle in Clash of Clans, you’ll need to part ways with 500 Gems to purchase the pack from the Trader.

Why indeed?

In a post on social media, the team behind Clash of Clans uncovered the strange cosmetics update, sending the community into disarray:

In the ad, the Archer Queen’s beans were in full view, front and centre for the discerning pervert to adore. However, diving into Clash of Clans revealed something less raunchy.

You can purchase one Foot Tribute decoration or seven Foot Tribute decorations, depending on how depraved you’re feeling, and what you get is a stone statue of a foot, in a sandal, hollowed out and used as a planter.

That’s it!

It joins the stranger items in the Clash of Clans line-up, such as the Kawaii Giant, WWE Title, Cowboy Skeleton, and Haaland Statue. These special edition decorations are released on limited runs, so if you don’t act fast, you’ll miss the Foot Tribute item. Wouldn’t that just be devastating?

In case you’re wondering, decorations are used to spruce up your village in Clash of Clans and have almost no function beyond being nice to look at.

Let us know on the Insider Gaming Discord server if you intend to snap up a Foot Tribute Bundle in Clash of Clans.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that Metro 2039 will be deeply political

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

item.title: Does Fortnite Save The World Give V-Bucks? Free V-Bucks, Explained
item.content:encoded:
Fortnite has made a major change with the Save The World game mode after years of its inclusion in the game, switching to a free-to-play model, raising questions about earning free V-Bucks.

In the April 16 update, Fortnite permanently removed Ballistic and Festival Battle Stage, with Rocket Racing set to follow later this year, but any upset about those departures was eased by Save The World becoming free-to-play.

Long-time players of the mode will know all about the free V-Bucks that are available, and Insider Gaming has all the details on whether that approach has shifted.

Does Fortnite Save The World Give V-Bucks?

Fortnite’s Save The World mode does still distribute V-Bucks for completing specific missions and objectives, but only for those who own the Founder’s Pack.

Prior to April 16, Save The World in Fortnite was only accessible if you purchased the mode, which came alongside the bonus of being able to earn free V-Bucks. Now the mode is available as free-to-play, the approach has changed.

  • More Insider Gaming: All Fortnite Save The World Twitch Drops & How to Get Them

While those who own the Founder’s Pack can continue to earn V-Bucks in the same way as before, those starting the game as free-to-play won’t have the same bonuses available.

Though that may come as a disappointment for some, it isn’t too much of a surprise, as Epic Games would have essentially been handing money away.

Can You Buy The Save The World Founder’s Pack?

The Save The World Founder’s Pack is no longer available to purchase directly from Epic Games, and has been unavailable for several years.

The Founder’s Pack was essentially an early access pass to Save The World, which was discontinued in June 2020. For the past six years, it’s been unavailable to purchase directly from Epic Games.

  • More Insider Gaming: How to Get Free Jess Save The World Skin in Fortnite

However, the Founder’s Pack for Save The World is available to purchase on the secondary market, though the price point is rather staggering.

The cost of a Founder’s Pack for Save The World in 2026 is several hundred dollars, and the outlay is not worth it as it would take a hefty chunk of time to grind for V-Bucks to make up that expense.

Are you enjoying Save The World following its arrival as a free-to-play mode in Fortnite? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Fortnite, take a look at the full patch notes for the April 16 update, and check out claims that a collab with The Boys will be released imminently.

MOBILE APP

item.title: ENVY Terminate canezerra’s Contract After Riot Ban
item.content:encoded:
ENVY has terminated the contract of their Valorant player, Alex ‘canezerra’ Banyasz, after Riot Games issued the player with a 12-month ban for breaking Riot TOS.

The ban is a hardware ban, preventing canezerra from playing or streaming the game for the 12-month period. As a result, ENVY has taken the decision to terminate canezerra’s contract, effective immediately.

ENVY lose a piece of their future

canezerra stood out as one of the stars of the ENVY Valorant Challengers League (VCL) project. The Duelist showed consistent impact in Tier 2 across the three stages of VCL in 2025.

Strong performances over the year ultimately earned ENVY a spot in VCT Ascension Americas, which they converted into a VCT Americas spot by defeating regional rivals TSM back-to-back, 2-1, 3-1.

canezerra showed strong performances across the VCT Ascension run, dropping over 20 kills on five occasions in ENVY’s playoff run.

However, VCT Americas berth meant the removal of canezerra and Ayan ‘ion2x’ Rastogi from the active roster due to age restrictions, removing two of the team’s crucial pieces.

As a result, canezerra’s removal has no immediate impact on the ENVY roster, but removes a significant part of the roster’s future potential as the player prepares to turn 18 in June.

ENVY finished 9th-10th in VCT Americas Kickoff 2026 and currently sit at a 0-1 record in VCT Americas Stage 1.

canezerra “fully committed” to return

canezerra shared a statement following his release, saying that he is, “really sorry to my fans, Envy, Riot, and everyone who supports me. I’ve let you down.

While there has been no formal confirmation of what violations the player made, canezerra’s statement states, “I made a serious mistake and said things I deeply regret.”

The player added, “especially in ranked, I’ve acted immaturely, and this is a clear wake-up call that I need to be better.”

As for the source of the ban, the player implied that actions during his streams contributed, saying, “This year I started taking streaming seriously… I always try to be entertaining, but I got lost and understand that doesn’t excuse what I said.”

The player confirmed that he wishes to return to Valorant, stating that he is “fully committed to this game and to coming back the right way,” stating that he wishes to “grow and make sure it never happens again.”

You can discuss the future of ENVY’s Valorant roster on our Discord.
For more news, see the details of Sentinels’ Partnership with Blue Otter.

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For April 17, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, April 17, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Virtuous
  • Hint 2: Truthful
  • Hint 3: Sincere

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Courage
  • Frankness
  • Fairness
  • Honest
  • Humility
  • Candor
  • Professionalism
  • Integrity
  • Sincerity

Today’s Contexto Answer For April 17, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Honesty

Honesty is the quality of being truthful, sincere, and fair in both words and actions.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on April 18.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more word game guides, check out the following:

  • NYT Connections

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today (#1041)—Answers for Friday, April 17
item.content:encoded:
Congratulations, you’ve made it to the end of another long week! It’s time to welcome the weekend, but before it gets here, you need to smash today’s NYT Connections puzzle. Fortunately, I’m here with the best NYT Connections hints and answers you’ll find anywhere online.

Simply scroll down, get the NYT Connections solutions you need today, and wrap up today’s challenge as quickly as possible!

How to Play NYT Connections

In June 2023, NYT Connections emerged as yet another game in the ever-growing lineup of the New York Times titles. This title soared immediately, and it’s easy to see why. As a free-to-play, accessible New York Times game, NYT Connections is available worldwide and can be played on desktop devices or in a mobile app.

But how do you play NYT Connections?

The NYT team will provide you with a grid of 16 words once a day. The only task left up to you is to sort those words into four groups of four by finding their commonalities. Every NYT Connections puzzle has just one solution, and some words can have double meanings, so it can sometimes be tricky to figure out the answers.

It’s also important to stress that the words are color-coded: yellow, blue, green, and purple. That’s in order of difficulty, from least to most.

What’s critical here is that you get four guesses every day, and if you use those, your NYT Connections answers for today will be out of reach, as it’ll be game over.

Today’s NYT Connections Hints (April 17)

Here are the words from today’s NYT Connections puzzle:

  • DOMINANT
  • KEY
  • ROOT
  • TAN
  • TONIC
  • STEM
  • HAMMER
  • GENERAL
  • BULB
  • SODA
  • COMMON
  • STRING
  • STORMY
  • LEAF
  • PEDAL
  • POPULAR

And here are the hints I can offer for today’s NYT Connections:

  • Yellow – Words you’d associate with a plant
  • Green – Words that are associated with something being ‘the most of’ something
  • Blue – Words you’d associate with a piano
  • Purple – Words that make up one half of popular drink names

Here’s the final warning before we get to the NYT Connections answers for today, April 17:

Are you sure you want to scroll further?

Very well!

NYT Connections Answers Explained for Today, April 17 (#1041)

If you want to jump straight to the answers for today’s NYT Connections puzzle, I’ve got you covered:

  • Yellow – BULB, LEAF, ROOT, STEM
  • Green – COMMON, DOMINANT, GENERAL, POPULAR
  • Blue – HAMMER, KEY, PEDAL, STRING
  • Purple – SODA, STORMY, TAN, TONIC

When Does NYT Connections Reset?

That’s today’s puzzle, but if you want the next one, the game resets daily at midnight local time (that’s your local time). You’ll have 24 hours to complete the puzzle when midnight ticks over in your timezone.

How did you do? Did you get a perfect run? Let me know what your streak looks like on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/nyt-connections-hints-solutions-april-17-1041/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Replaced Devs Forced to Address ‘AI-Based’ Game Comments
item.content:encoded:
On April 14, Replaced was released by Sad Cat Studios and Thunderful, emerging as a well-received 2.5D platformer with charming visuals and attractive set pieces. The title boasts a dark, cyberpunk theme rooted in an alternate 1980s world, with players assuming control of a human-AI hybrid.

Unfortunately, that last part was somewhat miscommunicated by some, leading a crowd on social media to assume AI had made the game in a major way. One review mentioned that Replaced is an ‘AI-based adventure’, prompting confusion that the game’s developer needed to address.

Replaced Was Not Made Using AI

In a recent review, Replaced was dubbed an ‘AI-based adventure that could do with a system update,’ which somewhat understandably perplexed some social media users. This comment ultimately drove Sad Cat Studios to the internet to set things right.

The team explained:

As we have seen, some people misunderstand what IGN means by AI-based. We just want to clarify:

This game was 100% handcrafted. No generative AI was used to make this. What IGN is referring to is the story about AI in an alternative 80s America.

Artificial intelligence in gaming has become a bandwagon topic over the years, with gamers lambasting studios for leaning on generative AI, in particular, to get their projects out the door.

Never mind that studios have been using AI to iterate faster and develop games more efficiently for a very long time. It’s only in the last couple of years that the concept of AI has become a boogeyman for most gamers’ fears, particularly those tied to anything artistic.

To further eradicate any confusion, IGN deleted the original post on social media that drew flak and went back to edit the review, scrubbing that line from the game’s summary. It now reads:

Replaced is a gripping and gorgeous 2.5D action platformer, even though this cyberpunk adventure could do with a system update to completely iron out the bugs.

Did you misread the line in the review, or do you have more common sense? Let us know your thoughts on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider gaming coverage, check out the news that Metro 2039 will be deeply political

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

item.title: Metro 2039 Promises Phenomenal Darkness and a Deep Political Charge
item.content:encoded:
4A Games recently revealed Metro 2039, the next major release in the legendary post-apocalyptic franchise. The trailer was nothing short of remarkable, showcasing a cutting-edge title with one of the most disturbing settings we’ve ever seen. Metro has always been known for darker, more morbid themes, but 2039 pushes that boundary further than ever.

In the run-up to the reveal, 4A Games didn’t beat around the bush. They explained that the Russian invasion of Ukraine had heavily influenced the game’s direction, and that was made extremely clear in the six-minute trailer posted on April 16. Not only does the game promise an intense, psychological deep-dive, but it also bears unveiled and critical references to the ongoing war aplenty.

4A Games is All-In on Politics in Metro 2039

Once the trailer had been delivered on April 16, 4A Games’ developers took centre-stage to discuss what it took to bring Metro 2039 to life. They didn’t hesitate, and some of the first words out of their mouths were reflective of the war in Ukraine, instigated mostly in 2020 and worsened in 2022.

That was roughly when another vision for the game, which was leaked mere days ago, was cancelled. Instead, 4A Games opted to push for an immediate pivot, focusing on this new story that better reflected their real-world situation, forced into a desperate and brutal war that went so far as to claim the lives of former Metro developers.

Unwilling to sit in the shadows, like those who inhabit the dank, haunted tunnels of the Metro, 4A Games decided to use their popular, post-apocalyptic platform to tell a story that hits so close to home, it’s drastically uncomfortable.

That’s why the first Metro 2039 trailer was laced with tale-telling imagery. We saw children murdered, trains full of kidnapped civilians being whisked away by iron-fisted ‘Novoreich’ soldiers, and nuclear explosions devastating the Kremlin in the heart of Moscow.

In a classroom built to indoctrinate the children of the Metro, we hear the crowd utter, ‘Our enemy has no pity for us,’ while images of dead and dying families are haphazardly sketched by faceless youngsters.

Our hero, a former Spartan Ranger turned insane by his past, attempts to break free from chains, both psychological and physical, to rescue these children, but ultimately fails. He’s confronted by Metro’s ‘Dark Ones’, once again using their otherworldly powers of corruption and mind control to alter the story from the background.

When the trailer cut, we were presented with stony-faced developers from 4A Games, talking about the nature of Metro 2039. The delivery was half focused on the title itself, while the other explained how it felt bringing to market art that quite clearly imitated life in many ways.

But now, war is our reality, and our message has shifted to be about the consequences.

The cost of silence, the horrors of tyranny, and the price of freedom.

In another segment:

Metro has always been a more tragic view on our actions as humanity. Then, tragedy came to us.

Everything we had planned for the next chapter of Metro changed in 2020 and more significantly, in 2022.

When Russia’s full-scale invasion began, it changed the lives of everyone in the studio, but more so of our team and families in Ukraine.

The war has shaped us. We have changed the story to be even more about choices, actions, consequences, and what you have ot pay to have a future.

Reality forced us to take a different approach.

The message in Metro 2039 isn’t hidden or subconscious. From the opening trailer, we know that the portrayal of the real-world circumstances still unfolding in Ukraine is at the surface, boiling, and shaping the way everything will unravel.

For those familiar with the Metro franchise, the political charge comes as no surprise. From the earliest novels penned by Dmitry Glukhovsky, Metro has always been rooted in these concepts of power, society, survival, and humanity. But Metro 2039 is preparing to be more of a soapbox title than anything 4A Games has ever made.

Metro 2039 will be released on Xbox, PlayStation 5, and PC this coming winter.

Are you interested in Metro 2039? Let us know your thoughts about the opening trailer on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that the Call of Duty movie has a release date

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.
